message:
feat(websocket): add WebSocket server/acceptor with Cx integration (bd-18mg)

Implement WebSocket server for accept-based connections:
- WebSocketAcceptor: validates and accepts upgrade requests
- ServerWebSocket: server-side connection with Cx cancellation
- accept()/accept_parsed() methods for raw bytes or parsed requests
- reject() helper for sending rejection responses
- Builder pattern for protocol/extension negotiation
- Automatic ping/pong handling
- Clean close handshake on cancellation (GoingAway 1001)

Export AcceptResponse, ServerWebSocket, WebSocketAcceptor, WsAcceptError
from net::websocket and net modules.

Note: Tests blocked by unrelated scheduler compilation errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
